name: Local Host Sending Malware
notes: This rule triggers when a malware is being sent from local hosts.
conditions_text: when the event category for the event is one of the following Malware
when the event context is Local to Local, Local to Remote
when Source IP not equals Destination IP
TD_list: APPLY Local Host Sending Malware on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following Malware
AND when the event context is Local to Local, Local to Remote
AND when Source IP not equals Destination IP
RED_list: Event description: The system has detected local systems sending malware.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
